problem id: 8082a958
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(3) AND SHR(7)

examples:
  01110001 -> 00000000
  01100000 -> 00000000
  11111111 -> 00000001
  10011100 -> 00000000
  10111010 -> 00000001
  11000010 -> 00000000
  11000011 -> 00000000
  01000011 -> 00000000
  01110000 -> 00000000

query: 11010001
predicted answer: 00000000
